the_signal.headline: n8n hits $5.2B valuation; enterprise AI orchestration is the battlefield
the_signal.body: SAP's strategic investment signals that workflow automation is becoming the critical infrastructure layer for enterprise AI deployments. For GTM teams selling into Fortune 500, this validates that 'glue layer' solutions win when they connect legacy systems to AI—not the AI models themselves. Your positioning needs to reflect this: you're selling operational reliability and governance, not innovation.

tool_drop.name: Komi-learn
tool_drop.what: Continuous memory and self-improvement system for coding agents that learns from past executions.
tool_drop.why: GTM engineers building agent-based revenue automation need agents that improve over time—this is how you move from PoC reliability (75% success) to production reliability (95%+) without constant manual tuning.

thread_of_day.title: AI Agent Architecture Patterns: From Prototype To Production
thread_of_day.takeaway: Control topology and blast radius matter more than model choice—pick the wrong architecture pattern and your agent failures cascade across your entire revenue stack.

quote.text: 92% of C-suite leaders say they're fully confident in AI ROI, yet 58% admit there's no clear owner of AI in their organization.

whats_moving.context: 75% of enterprises lack governance frameworks (per n8n); SAP-n8n partnership makes this a competitive differentiator for vendors who solve it first.
Three separate n8n posts on agent reliability, memory types, and failure modes dropped today—the industry is collectively realizing PoC agents don't scale without systematic design patterns.
n8n's focus on event-driven systems suggests the next wave of AI automation requires asynchronous, scalable orchestration—not synchronous, single-request patterns.

act_on_this: Map your AI product's control topology against n8n's published agent architecture patterns; if your blast radius includes critical revenue systems, you need explicit safeguards documented before your next enterprise pitch.

numbers.stat: $5.2B valuation for n8n (2x increase from Series C less than a year ago)
numbers.context: Workflow automation for enterprise AI is becoming a $10B+ category—if you're selling point solutions, you're now competing with well-funded orchestration platforms that SAP will distribute globally.
